name: ToggleGroup
description: Group of toggles with single or multiple selection.

api.name: ToggleGroup
api.description: Group of toggles with single or multiple selection.

records.name: ToggleGroupContext
records.signature:
ToggleGroupContext(
        ToggleGroupType Type,
        HashSet<string> SelectedItems,
        ToggleGroupVariant Variant,
        Lumeo.Size Size,
        EventCallback<string> Toggle,
        Func<string, bool, string> GetTabIndex,
        List<string> ItemValues,
        Dictionary<string, string> ItemIds,
        Dictionary<string, bool> ItemDisabled,
        // #69: stable-id registration (item id, value, disabled, render generation)
        // so the parent rebuilds ItemValues in DOM order each pass.
        Action<string, string, bool, int> RegisterItem,
        Action<string, string> UnregisterItem,
        // #169: focus-anchor sync — item reports the value it was focused on.
        Action<string> SetFocusValue,
        int Generation,
        // The role=group element id — the anchor for the DOM-order roving-nav probe
        // (Interop.GetOrderedDescendantIds) so arrow-key order tracks the live DOM
        // after a keyed reorder. Always present (LumeoIds.New on the root div).
        string ContainerId)

examples.title: Single Selection
examples.code:
<ToggleGroup Type="ToggleGroup.ToggleGroupType.Single">
    <ToggleGroupItem Value="bold">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Bold" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </ToggleGroupItem>
    <ToggleGroupItem Value="italic">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Italic" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </ToggleGroupItem>
    <ToggleGroupItem Value="underline">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Underline" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </ToggleGroupItem>
</ToggleGroup>

examples.title: Multiple Selection
examples.code:
<ToggleGroup Type="ToggleGroup.ToggleGroupType.Multiple">
    <ToggleGroupItem Value="bold">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Bold" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </ToggleGroupItem>
    <ToggleGroupItem Value="italic">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Italic" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </ToggleGroupItem>
    <ToggleGroupItem Value="underline">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Underline" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </ToggleGroupItem>
</ToggleGroup>

examples.title: Outline Variant
examples.code:
<ToggleGroup Type="ToggleGroup.ToggleGroupType.Single" Variant="ToggleGroup.ToggleGroupVariant.Outline">
    <ToggleGroupItem Value="left">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.AlignLeft" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </ToggleGroupItem>
    <ToggleGroupItem Value="center">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.AlignCenter" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </ToggleGroupItem>
    <ToggleGroupItem Value="right">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.AlignRight" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </ToggleGroupItem>
</ToggleGroup>

parameters.name: PressEffect
parameters.description: Visual feedback when the item is pressed. Default is None.

mdSummary:
# ToggleGroup

Group of toggles with single or multiple selection.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Selection
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/toggle-group

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ToggleGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroup | Type | `ToggleGroupType` | `ToggleGroupType.Single` |  |
| ToggleGroup | Variant | `ToggleGroupVariant` | `ToggleGroupVariant.Default` |  |
| ToggleGroup | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` |  |
| ToggleGroup | Value | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroup | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroup | SelectedValues | `IEnumerable<string>?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroup | SelectedValuesChanged | `EventCallback<IEnumerable<string>>` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroupItem | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| ToggleGroupItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroupItem | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroupItem | PressEffect | `Button.ButtonPressEffect` | `Button.ButtonPressEffect.None` | Visual feedback when the item is pressed. Default is None. |
| ToggleGroupItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroupItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| ToggleGroupItem | Context | `ToggleGroup.ToggleGroupContext` | `default!` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (ToggleGroup) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ToggleGroupItem) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`)
- `SelectedValuesChanged` (`EventCallback<IEnumerable<string>>`)

## Sub-components
- `ToggleGroupItem`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`ToggleGroup.ToggleGroupContext`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<ToggleGroup />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/ToggleGroup/ToggleGroup.razor`
- `UI/ToggleGroup/ToggleGroupItem.razor`
